1: Do a funny dance for 30 seconds.
2: Speak in an accent for the next three rounds.
3: Sing the chorus of your favorite song.
4: Pretend to be a waiter/waitress and take snack orders from everyone in the group.
5: Act like a robot until it's your turn again.
6: Talk in a high-pitched voice until your next turn.
7: Give a compliment to everyone in the group.
8: Do your best impression of a famous person.
9: Do 10 jumping jacks and count them out loud.
10: Balance a book on your head for the next three rounds.
12: Make a silly face and keep it that way for two minutes.
13: Do an impression of your favorite cartoon character.
14: Speak only in rhymes until your next turn.
15: Draw a picture of a pet with your eyes closed.
16: Do your best chicken dance outside for a minute.
17: Make up a story about a random object in the room.
18: Pretend you are swimming underwater for the next two minutes.
19: Make a fish face and talk like a fish.
21: Do an impression of a celebrity until someone can guess who you are.
22: Read the last text message you received out loud.
23: Wear socks on your hands for the next three rounds.
24: Sing everything you say for the next two rounds.
25: Act like a monkey until your next turn.
26: Talk without moving your lips for the next round.
28: Try to juggle three small objects.
29: Balance a spoon on your nose for 10 seconds.
31: Pretend to be a news reporter and give a funny news update.
33: Do an impression of your favorite teacher.
35: Pretend to be a statue for the next round.
36: Act like your favorite animal until your next turn.
37: Pretend to be a character from a book for the next two rounds.
38: Make up a poem about the person to your left.
39: Try to touch your nose with your tongue.
40: Pretend you are an alien and introduce yourself to the group.
41: Spin around 10 times and then try to walk in a straight line.
43: Make a crown out of paper and wear it for the next three rounds.
44: Talk like a pirate until your next turn.
45: Act like you are playing an invisible guitar.
46: Pretend to be a superhero and describe your powers.
47: Whisper everything you say for the next round.
48: Act like a chef and describe how to make a peanut butter and jelly sandwich.
49: Do your best impression of a baby crying.
50: Pretend you are in slow motion until your next turn.
51: Speak in a deep voice until your next turn.
52: Do a silly walk across the room.
53: Pretend to be a rock star for the next two rounds.
54: Make a funny hat out of paper and wear it for the next three rounds.
